tables.name: cuad_contract
tables.description: Legal contract documents annotated with 41 clause-level attributes from the CUAD (Contract Understanding Atticus Dataset) benchmark. Each row represents a contract with extracted clause information. Contains 510 contracts.

columns.name: document_name
columns.description: Title or type of the legal contract document. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'DISTRIBUTOR AGREEMENT', 'Promotion and Distribution Agreement', 'SUPPLY CONTRACT', 'WEB SITE HOSTING AGREEMENT', 'JOINT FILING AGREEMENT'.

columns.name: parties
columns.description: Names and roles of the parties involved in the contract, including companies, individuals, and their designations. Type: TEXT. Often contains multiple parties separated by '|'. May include entity type labels like 'Company', 'Distributor', 'Seller', 'Buyer'.

columns.name: agreement_date
columns.description: Date when the contract/agreement was signed or executed. Type: TEXT. Free-form date text extracted from the contract. Examples: '7th day of September, 1999.', '1 August 2011'. Empty if not specified.

columns.name: effective_date
columns.description: Date when the contract becomes effective. Type: TEXT. Contains the relevant clause text from the contract describing the effective date. Empty if not specified.

columns.name: expiration_date
columns.description: Date or conditions under which the contract expires. Type: TEXT. Contains the relevant clause text describing expiration terms. Examples include specific dates or duration descriptions.

columns.name: renewal_term
columns.description: Terms and conditions for contract renewal, including automatic renewal provisions and duration. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if no renewal terms.

columns.name: notice_period_to_terminate_renewal
columns.description: Required notice period to prevent automatic renewal or to terminate the contract. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not specified.

columns.name: governing_law
columns.description: Jurisdiction and governing law specified in the contract. Type: TEXT. Contains the relevant clause text. Examples reference specific states, countries, or legal frameworks. Empty if not specified.

columns.name: most_favored_nation
columns.description: Most favored nation clause ensuring equal or better terms compared to other parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if no such clause.

columns.name: non_compete
columns.description: Non-competition restrictions preventing parties from engaging in competing business activities. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if no non-compete clause.

columns.name: exclusivity
columns.description: Exclusivity provisions granting exclusive rights to one or more parties within defined markets or territories. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if no exclusivity clause.

columns.name: no_solicit_of_customers
columns.description: Provisions preventing solicitation of the other party's customers. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: no_solicit_of_employees
columns.description: Provisions preventing solicitation or hiring of the other party's employees. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: non_disparagement
columns.description: Clause preventing parties from making negative public statements about each other. Type: TEXT. Empty if not present.

columns.name: termination_for_convenience
columns.description: Right of one or both parties to terminate the contract without cause, typically with notice. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: rofr_rofo_rofn
columns.description: Right of First Refusal (ROFR), Right of First Offer (ROFO), or Right of First Negotiation (ROFN) clauses. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: change_of_control
columns.description: Provisions triggered by a change in ownership or control of one of the parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: anti_assignment
columns.description: Restrictions on the assignment or transfer of contract rights or obligations to third parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: revenue_profit_sharing
columns.description: Provisions for sharing revenue or profits between the parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: price_restrictions
columns.description: Clauses governing pricing constraints, adjustments, or price protection mechanisms. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: minimum_commitment
columns.description: Minimum purchase, volume, or performance commitments required by one or more parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: volume_restriction
columns.description: Restrictions or requirements on transaction volumes. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: ip_ownership_assignment
columns.description: Provisions for the assignment or transfer of intellectual property ownership. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: joint_ip_ownership
columns.description: Provisions for joint ownership of intellectual property created under the agreement. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: license_grant
columns.description: License grants from one party to another, including scope, territory, and restrictions. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: non_transferable_license
columns.description: Provisions specifying that a granted license cannot be transferred to third parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: affiliate_license_licensor
columns.description: License provisions extending rights to affiliates of the licensor. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: affiliate_license_licensee
columns.description: License provisions extending rights to affiliates of the licensee. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: unlimited_all_you_can_eat_license
columns.description: License grants with unlimited usage rights. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: irrevocable_or_perpetual_license
columns.description: License grants that are irrevocable or perpetual in nature. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: source_code_escrow
columns.description: Provisions for placing source code in escrow for the benefit of the licensee. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: post_termination_services
columns.description: Obligations for providing services after the contract terminates. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: audit_rights
columns.description: Right of one or both parties to audit the other's records for compliance verification. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: uncapped_liability
columns.description: Provisions where liability is not subject to a cap or limit. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: cap_on_liability
columns.description: Provisions setting a maximum limit on liability. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text describing the cap amount or formula. Empty if not present.

columns.name: liquidated_damages
columns.description: Pre-determined damages amounts payable upon breach. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: warranty_duration
columns.description: Duration of warranties provided under the contract. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text specifying the warranty period. Empty if not present.

columns.name: insurance
columns.description: Requirements for insurance coverage by one or both parties. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: covenant_not_to_sue
columns.description: Agreement by one or both parties not to initiate legal proceedings against the other. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.

columns.name: third_party_beneficiary
columns.description: Provisions identifying or excluding third party beneficiaries under the contract. Type: TEXT. Contains extracted clause text. Empty if not present.
